meaning: n.[植](=jimsonweed)曼陀罗,(治气喘病的)曼陀罗叶
examples: G was adopted to determine toxicity of Datura stramonium.
To investigate the biotransformation of hydroquinone by cell suspension cultures of Datura stramonium.
Cultured cells derived from stems of Datura stramonium were maintained in Linsmaiher and Skoog (ls) solid medium.
